description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a hip roof in a muted gray color. The front facade features four large windows with decorative railings and a low brick wall enclosing a small garden area with green foliage. The rear side has a balcony and a visible door, along with a utility box mounted on the wall. The side views reveal a continuous brick exterior and a wraparound garden or patio area with outdoor furniture and potted plants. The house has a compact, rectangular footprint and a clean, modern appearance with minimal ornamentation. The overall design suggests a contemporary urban residence with private outdoor space.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a hip roof, large windows, and a small enclosed garden or patio area. The design is clean and urban, with minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing four large windows, decorative railings, and a brick-walled garden with green foliage.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the uninterrupted brick wall, hip roof, and the garden or patio area with visible plants and furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a balcony, a door, and a utility box, with the garden area partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain brick wall, garden area, and some outdoor furniture visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is integrated into the front facade with a low brick wall, no visible steps or porch, and features large windows with decorative railings.
